comment: Classification of contributor-fixable PR checks. See README.md. 'match.check' is the CHECK-RUN name (= job name or job id), not a step name.

signals.title: Lint
signals.guidance: Run `make pre-commit -B` locally to auto-fix most lint issues, then commit and push the result.

signals.title: Codegen
signals.guidance: Generated files are out of date with your changes. Run `make codegen -B` (or `make pre-commit -B`) locally and commit the regenerated files.

signals.title: UI
signals.guidance: The UI build/lint failed. Run `yarn --cwd ui install && yarn --cwd ui build && yarn --cwd ui lint` locally and commit any fixes.

signals.title: Build (CLI)
signals.guidance: The CLI failed to compile. Reproduce with `make cli` and fix the build error — the compiler output is in the linked log.

signals.title: Build (controller)
signals.guidance: The controller failed to compile. Reproduce with `make controller` and fix the build error — the compiler output is in the linked log.

signals.title: Docs
signals.guidance: The documentation build/lint failed. Run `make docs` locally (it auto-fixes some issues) and commit the result.

signals.title: PR title
signals.guidance: Your PR title must follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/), e.g. `fix: ...`, `feat: ...`, `docs: ...`. Edit the PR title (no push needed).

signals.title: Feature description (.features/)
signals.guidance: Feature PRs need a valid `.features/pending/*.md` file. Run `make feature-new` to create one, edit it, then check it with `make features-validate`.

stepGuidance.No ./.features/*.md addition: This is a `feat:` PR but no feature description file was added. Run `make feature-new` and edit the generated file under `.features/pending/`.
stepGuidance.Validate ./.features/*.md changes: Your `.features/pending/*.md` file failed validation. Run `make features-validate` locally and fix the reported problems.

signals.title: DCO (sign-off)
signals.guidance: One or more commits are missing the `Signed-off-by` line. Sign off (`git commit --amend --signoff` for the last commit, or `git rebase --signoff main`) and force-push. See the [DCO app](https://github.com/apps/dco) for details.
